login.title: Sign in
login.tagline: AI-powered business insights for your business

signup.title: Create your account
signup.tagline: Start managing your business with AI insights
signup.whatsappHint: From your Meta Developer Console → WhatsApp → Phone numbers
signup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noInsightsYet: No AI insights generated yet. Visit the

insights.title: AI Insights
insights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis of your business data
insights.clickGenerate: Click "Generate insights" to analyze your business data with AI

hero.title: You don't need more customers — you need to answer faster
hero.subtitle: One simple CRM: inventory, WhatsApp, leads, sales, and daily AI insights. Get started in minutes.

trust.title: Your data is secured
trust.subtitle: We run on Amazon Web Services. Your business data is encrypted and stored securely in the cloud.

phoneMock.msgIn: Hi — do you have the blue shirts in stock?
phoneMock.msgOut: Yes, 12 left. Want me to reserve two for you?

offers.title: Everything you need in one place
offers.subtitle: Stop juggling spreadsheets and apps. Clienta AI keeps inventory, customers, and insights in sync.
offers.feature0Desc: One catalog for all your stock. Set reorder points, import via CSV, and get low-stock alerts so you never run out.
offers.feature1Desc: Reply to customers where they already are. Full conversation history and AI-assisted responses linked to contacts.
offers.feature2Desc: Daily summaries you’ll actually use: demand forecasts, reorder suggestions, revenue trends, and spending insights.
offers.feature3Desc: One place for every customer. Lead status, tier, and spend history so you know who matters most.
offers.feature4Desc: Sales and daily summaries in one view. From WhatsApp cart to checkout — no re-typing or spreadsheets.

collaborate.title: Collaborate with us
collaborate.subtitle: Interested in partnering, reselling, or custom solutions? Get in touch.
collaborate.formSuccess: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 1–2 business days.
collaborate.formError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

services.title: Custom websites & applications
services.subtitle: We design and build polished, scalable digital products — not only Clienta AI. From marketing sites to full-stack apps, we partner with businesses that want clarity, performance, and solutions that grow with them.
services.webDesc: Brand-forward sites, conversion-focused landing pages, and fast, accessible front ends that look sharp on every device.
services.webPoint1: Responsive UI, design systems, and content structure
services.appDesc: Custom web apps, internal tools, and integrations that connect your stack — CRM, payments, messaging, and operations — with maintainable, production-grade code.
services.appPoint3: Iterative delivery and long-term support options
services.ctaHint: Share your goals — we’ll follow up with next steps and a tailored scope.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, or unlock AI on Pro — pay monthly or annually (more savings). Contact us for a quote.
pricing.starterDesc: Core CRM for inventory and WhatsApp — ideal to get started.
pricing.growthDesc: Monthly or annual billing — choose annual for the best savings.
pricing.featureMonthlyOrAnnual: Monthly or annual billing (save with annual)

inventoryForm.imageStoredHint: Image will be stored in S3 and used in WhatsApp.

whatsapp.title: Connect WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Link your Meta WhatsApp number to this business so the n8n workflow can route messages here.
whatsapp.getPhoneIdHint: Get your Phone number ID from
whatsapp.phoneIdCopyHint: → your App → WhatsApp → API Setup → Phone numbers. Copy the numeric ID (e.g. 106540352242922).
whatsapp.phoneIdRequired: Meta Phone number ID is required.
whatsapp.tokenHint: From Meta App → WhatsApp → API → Temporary or System User token. Leave blank to keep existing.
whatsapp.businessAccountHint: From Meta Business Suite → WhatsApp Manager → Phone numbers (Account ID).
whatsapp.placeholderAiPrompt: You are a helpful store assistant for...
whatsapp.successLinked: WhatsApp is linked. n8n can now resolve your business when messages arrive.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Sales history (orders come from WhatsApp flow)
transactions.noTransactionsHint: Transactions are created when orders are completed via WhatsApp

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: WhatsApp conversations — click to open and reply
messages.noConversationsHint: WhatsApp chats will appear here (one per number)
messages.conversationClosed: This conversation is closed. Sending is disabled to comply with WhatsApp policies. If the customer messages again, it will reopen as Active.
messages.sentViaHint: Sent via WhatsApp using your Connect WhatsApp token.
messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view thread and reply
